meaning: n.顶部,顶端,极点,顶蓬,陀螺,(常用复数)根菜植物的叶子,上部,盖子adj.最高的,顶上的,头等的vt.盖,戴,高耸,达到顶端,截去(植物)顶端,高过,超越vi.结束,完成,胜过
examples: She's gunning for the top job.
United dominated the first half without ever hitting top gear against an efficient Villarreal side.
Critics see a different reason why products like eggs and hamburger rise to the top.
